usage:
  style <command> [flags]

commands:
  check     run STYLE.md checks
  fix       run safe style auto-fixes
  doctor    check pinned style tools
  coverage  show STYLE.md automation coverage
  install   install pinned style tools
  lock      resolve archive-tool hashes to quill.lock

run `style help <command>` or `style <command> -h` to see command-specific flags
